subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.
explanation_ar: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which royal family ruled Rajasthan before the establishment of the British Raj?
question_hi: राजस्थान के संतुलपुर की गैरागांवां के समाज से बीजन राज के प्रधान हैंगांवां, इसको स्वतराज राजकंतुराज हैंगांवां
राजस्थान के समाज से प्रधान हैंगांवां, इसको स्वतराज राजकंतुराज हैंगांवां
explanation_en: Before the establishment of British Raj, Jaipur was the capital of Rajasthan, ruled by the Maharaja of Jaipur.
explanation_hi: बीजन राजकंतुराज हैंगावां, इसको स्वतराज राजकंतुराज हैंगावां
explanation_ar: قبل تأسيس الحكم البريطاني، جايبور كانت عاصمة راجستان، تحكمها مهراجا جايبور.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first Maharaja of Jaipur?
explanation_en: Maharaja Sawai Man Singh I was the first Maharaja of Jaipur.
explanation_ar: سواي مہراجا ساوای مان سینگ اٹھا كان أول مہراجا لجایپور.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the famous dance form of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Ghoomar is a famous dance form in Rajasthan. It originated from Jaisalmer and is popular among the Rajasthani people.
explanation_hi: Ghoomar राजस्थान के जयसालमर से वांडें वांडं सालमर से वांडं बॉरी
explanation_ar: غوومار هو شكل رقص مشهور في راجستان. نشأ من جايسلَمر وهو شائع بين أهل راجستانية.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first Mewar king?
explanation_en: Pratap Singh was the first king of Mewar (Mewar) kingdom.
explanation_ar: Pratap Singh was the first king of Mewar (Mewar) kingdom.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first Rajput king of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Pratap Singh was the first Rajput king of Rajasthan.
question_ar: من أول راجبوت کا کا کا ملك راجاستان؟
question_en: Who was the first Rajput king of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Rao Jait Singh was the first Rajput king of Rajasthan.
